category_sources: source_facts.description says Libmodsecurity is one component of the ModSecurity v3 project.
source_facts.homepage is the OWASP ModSecurity repository.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official OWASP ModSecurity project repository.
docs_sources: Official OWASP ModSecurity GitHub repository provides wiki and README documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Libmodsecurity and ModSecurity v3.
source_facts.homepage shows the project under OWASP ModSecurity.
